motivation: April 28, 2026: v13 predicted '67° or more · STRONG BET' at 3:36 PM with peak observed = 65°F and current = 62°F. Model had raw signals but no explicit interaction terms tying late-hour + observed-deficit. v14 adds 5 blind-spot interaction features so a single tree split captures the conjunction. late_obs_below_pred is the headline feature: (obs_latest_hour>=13) * max(0, mm_hrrr_max - obs_max_so_far).
